name: Bran Muffins-in-Waiting
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the warm water with 1 cup of bran cereal.
2. Sift the flour and baking soda together.
3. In a large bowl, beat the butter until creamy.
4. Add sugar in 1/2-cup increments, beating after each addition.
5. Blend in eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Scrape the sides of the bowl often.
7. Stir in the flour mixture and buttermilk alternately, adding each in 1/2-cup portions.
8. Stir in the remaining bran cereal.
9. Cover and refrigerate for at least 6 hours before baking.
10. To bake the muffins, preheat the oven to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C).
11. Grease 2 1/2-inch muffin cups.
12. Gently stir the batter.
13. Fill each muffin cup with about 1/4 cup of batter.
14. Bake for 20 minutes, or until nicely browned.
15. Remove from the pan and serve hot with butter. Makes 6 cups of batter or about 24 muffins.
